textbox.text: I mostly ranked them on if they were my "type" or not, and if I could imagine myself having a crush on them. I also judged a few of them based on how I think their personality would be like. However, I think that some of the pictures had a filter that changed the sex of the model, so if it didn't. turn out too pretty looking to me, I gave them a lower rating.
